description: Marks a point on the graph using the ruler instrument with a specified orientation. The result behaves as a point and can be used by line(), vector(), etc.
utility: Place a point with ruler animation and orientation — result is reusable as a point geometry

arguments.name: type(orientation)
arguments.description: Ruler orientation: leftToRight (default), rightToLeft, topToBottom, or bottomToTop

alternates.description: Mark point with horizontal left-to-right ruler (default)
Mark point with specified ruler orientation

examples.scenario: Place a point using ruler instrument with left-to-right direction
